title: Map Widget defaults to one area (and not the most populated one)
excerpt: I have a map widget to show all items from a single board, which I’ve created a shareable link for.  The map always defaults to one area of the world (one of my items in Singapore), this item is the only one in this area…

posts.author: kirsty_redgate (Kirsty Roper)
posts.cookedHtml: I have a map widget to show all items from a single board, which I’ve created a shareable link for. The map always defaults to one area of the world (one of my items in Singapore), this item is the only one in this area, but we have many in the US. Is there any way to make the map open on the US or Europe where I have many more items please?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Kirsty,

I hear where you’re coming from here. I am afraid it’s expected at this stage however I will share this feedback to our team internally incase they can make some changes to this behaviour. Thank you for flagging this with me

posts.author: MMatharu (Megan Matharu)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this? The map could be a great widget if it defaults to centre a location of our choice

posts.author: MCautreels (Maarten Cautreels - Tryve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Kirsty,

We have an app in the marketplace, Map View Pro, which will automatically show you all pins when you open the map (so both US & Singapore in your case). It also offers more customizability in terms of pin color and the information displayed when you click on a pin.

Best,

Maarten
